feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Task type in parallel processing
entry.content:
Hi,

currently I am reseachring on parallel processing in ABAP.

The most solutions I found so far are based on asynchronous RFC calls. So far so good.

Also, in most cases, one talks about 'tasks' instead of 'jobs' or 'calls'.
Especially regarding the call `STARTING NEW TASK ...`


Unfortunately, for me it's not clear, what we are talking about on a technical layer...

Is a 'task' in general a 'background job" that runs on an application server?
Is there any transactional overview, like SM37, to see all created (and running) 'tasks"?
Is a 'task' a dialog process, so do I have to take care about the limit of dialog processes?

Maybe anyone can clearify.

BR

entry.title: Determine task type when using STARTING NEW TASK
entry.content:
Hi,

is there a possibilty to determine the task type of the created task by `STARTING NEW TASK` call?

So, I guess STARTING NEW TASK will create a new batch/background task... but is it possible to get the get the created type (D, V, B, S, E) in its own context?

BR

entry.title: Smart Forms not printing on Zebra ZT231 Printer
entry.content:
I've created a Smart Form for a 1.125 X 3.5 label to be sent to a Zebra ZT231.  When printing to the ZT231 printer as the Windows default printer it works fine.  When we try to print directly to the printer on the network using the ZLZEB2 device type we get some data output, but not in the format of the Smart Form. After researching OSS notes on the issues we are having we found that the label needed to be designed to the size specifications of the label and use one of the YZB300 device types.

We have since formatted the page size for the label to 29mm X 89mm (couldn't use inches with decimals) and are using the YZB300U device type.  When we try to print directly to the printer from SAP no spool is being created and it will not print on the printer.

What I've done so far:

  • Created new device type based on YZB300U
  • Created new portrait and landscape page formats 
  • Created new format type for new page format
  • Changed Smart Form page format to the newly created page format
  • Changed label orientation to landscape
  • Changed the printer device type to the newly created device type

Can anyone tell me what I'm missing to get this working?

entry.title: How to get list all data in Tcode CKMLQS
entry.content:
Dear all,

We need to get the data in all nodes in Tcode CKMLQS ( evaluated quantity ). It is in the red rectangle in the picture.

Could someone tell me the tables for that or how to do that?

Thank you so much!

entry.title: How to append an existing custom structure to a standard table
entry.content:
Hi,

I created a custom structure and I need to add it in append inside a standard table.

but if I click the "Append structure" button it tells me that the structure already exists:

I don't want to create the structure, because it already exists, but I just need to add it to the standard table. How can I do that?

 

thank you

entry.title: how to repeat table header in all pages
entry.content:
Hi All,
I've made Adobe form for delivery & included header and items table in it.

My problem is when the line items are getting oveflowed they are going on next page which is correct, but along with that line items "table header" is not going to next page. 
i want that 'table header' on next page till the items goes to the page.

NOTE: i tried option "include header in sunsequent pages" for header row, but it is showing till the 2nd page only.
please suggest something.
thanks.

entry.title: Want to know CO11N Final reservation indicator marked place in program
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a requirement to find out the Co11N final reservation indicator mark place. Means I want to know exact program or coding place where the KZEAR field will be mark with 'X'. When I debugged i can see RESB-KZEAR is blank in initial screen of CO11N select query place but after that where exactly the internal table of RESB getting marked 'X' to field KZEAR. Anyone can help me on this please, Already I spent lot of time to debug this standard process.

Thanks.

entry.title: RAP, create child entities based on static factory action
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am working on RAP Application where it consists of a Parent Entity with 3 child entities.
The Application is Managed with Late numbering.
I added a Action button at Child entity that it should create an entry/entries depends on inputs of action button pop-up.

When Purchase Order and/or Purchase item input is given, child entities are to be created and added at line item.




In Root view behavior, action is defined as 

  static factory action  getPurc parameter YINV_COPY_PO [1];

 For action button input, created an Abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO

@EndUserText.label: 'Copy PO Abstract entity'
define abstract entity YINV_COPY_PO
{
   @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'I_PurchaseOrder', element: 'PurchaseOrder' } }]
    ebeln : ebeln;
    ebelp : ebelp;   
}


yi_rbkp is parent entity with belnr, gjahr as key fields whereas yi_rseg is child entity with key fields as belnr,gjahr,buzei. The child entities have to be created based on ebeln and ebelp as these are not dependent of the Parent entity key fields. 

The below method logic could be incorrect and it ends up in below runtime error.

Method logic in Behavior

  METHOD getPurc.

    DATA lt_item TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE yi_rbkp\\yi_rbkp\_itm.
    DATA(ls_param) = VALUE #( keys[ 1 ]-%param OPTIONAL ).

    IF ls_param-ebelp IS INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @DATA(lt_ekpo)
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln.
    ELSEIF ls_param-ebeln IS NOT INITIAL AND ls_param-ebelp IS NOT INITIAL.
      SELECT * FROM
      ekpo INTO TABLE
      @LT_ekpo
      WHERE ebeln = @LS_param-ebeln
      AND ebelp = @LS_param-ebelp.
    ELSEIF ls_param IS INITIAL.
      EXIT.
    ENDIF.

    READ ENTITIES OF yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg BY \_hdr
    ALL FIELDS
    WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
    RESULT DATA(lt_rbkp).

    LOOP AT keys ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<key>).
      APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_item ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<item>).

      <item>-%cid_ref = <key>-%cid.
      <item>-%is_draft = <key>-%param-%is_draft.
      LOOP AT  lt_ekpo ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<ekpo>).
        APPEND INITIAL LINE TO <item>-%target ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<targ>).
        <targ>-%data = CORRESPONDING #( <ekpo> ).
        <targ>-%cid = <key>-%cid.
        <targ>-%is_draft = '01'.
        <targ>-%control-ebeln = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-ebelp = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-gjahr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-matnr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-menge = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-shkzg = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-waers = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-werks = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-wrbtr = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
        <targ>-%control-zekkn = if_abap_behv=>mk-on.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDLOOP.

    MODIFY ENTITIES of yi_rbkp IN LOCAL MODE
    ENTITY yi_rseg   
    CREATE BY \_itm
    AUTO FILL CID
    FROM lt_item
    MAPPED DATA(ls_mapped)
         FAILED   DATA(ls_failed_modify)
         REPORTED DATA(ls_reported_modify).

    IF ls_failed_modify IS NOT INITIAL.
      failed = ls_failed_modify.
      reported = ls_reported_modify.
      RETURN.
    ENDIF.

    mapped-yi_rseg = ls_mapped-yi_rseg.
  ENDMETHOD.


Runtime error

entry.title: BAPI_ACC_INVOICE_RECEIPT_POST Negative sign not updating for positive amount document
entry.content:
Hi, 

Using BAPI_ACC_INVOICE_RECEIPT_POST, I am trying to create an accounting document with a positive amount and a negative quantity. 

Despite the BAPI posting the correct positive amount, but the quantity is posted with a positive sign.

It would be appreciated if you could tell me how we can achieve create accounting document with negative quantities for positive amounts. below is my values passing to BAPI structure.

Amount is 8 dollars and -1 quantity.

entry.title: Questions for CDS aggregation expression
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I have a CDS view like header-item hierarchy, assuming 1 header to n items, and I want to do aggregation on item level.

I tried to group by on the header field and select the first item as aggregation result, but I only see expressions like MAX, MIN, AVG. Is there a way that I can simply use the line of first item.

The second question is that if I use MAX, how to handle with RAW type because it was not supported.

Last question is that if association exists, is it required to include all association fields in the group by field list?

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Create CDS Entity in system 2 based on table in system 1
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are looking to create a CDS entity in system 2 based on data present in system 1. This entity in system 2 will be used by PaPM tool in system 1 for further processing, based on the following requirement:

In system 1, PaPM team are trying to build a solution, but the source data is present in system 2. Source data is too huge, and filters applied via PaPM in system 1 aren't working effectively. We are looking to create CDS entity in system 2, based on the filters maintained in system 1 (which is an ABAP table), so that PaPM can use the CDS created in system 2 as a source with less number of fields. 

We tried the following options, but they don't fit our requirement:

1. Custom entity and ABAP interface (Custom entity can't be used for data fetch and can be used for RAP framework only, so couldn't go further)

2. Entity with Virtual data elements (Entity doesn't reflect the values calculated via Virtual data elements, unless used in Odata/RAP, which doesn't meet our requirement.)

Is there any way to achieve this? 

I see one way is to create the filter table in system 2, and create CDS in system, but this requires efforts in building an Fiori app based on RAP framework (for user input), Odata (for excel upload) and UI5 coding.

Thanks & Regards,

Naga

entry.title: SAP and Arm64 version of Windows 11 with Prism emulator (Snapdragon X series)
entry.content:
I'm wondering if anyone has experience with the new Snapdragon X series Windows 11 PCs. My expectation is that all new cloud solutions should work seamlessly through the browser, just like on x64 or x86 systems. However, for other tools such as SAP GUI, Java GUI, ADT (ABAP Development Tools), and even the OpenJDK for Windows on ARM64, the situation may be different. I understand that it's still early days, and some older solutions may never receive full support.

I'm also interested in how well the Prism emulator works for running SAP applications. I’m presuming that even if emulation adds a bit more than 20% processing overhead, it wouldn’t be too significant or even noticeable if everything functions as expected. The challenge is with the drivers and VPNs, which do not work under the Prism emulator.

Despite these concerns, there is already a substantial list of native software for Windows on ARM that’s available today. It will be interesting to see how the ecosystem continues to develop.

entry.title: Unable to create hyperlink in adobe form from SO10 Text
entry.content:
Hi ABAPers,

I am unable to create hyperlink in adobe forms , taking text from SO10.

Used smartstyles method <HL>, used <a href > method , made the change in text field to rich text - Not worked.

My requirement is I have text in so10 and wanted to make one string as hyperlink

Any solution for this?

entry.title: How to mange and distribute fix in custom package to customers
entry.content:
Hi Gurus, 

We developed our custom ABAP packages under our namspace and implement it to our customer systems.

At the moment the way we are managing and distribute fix to our customer is manually by making local changes in customer dev systems. (Weekly collect & categorize issues in customer systems, make changes in our central dev system and distribute the same to other customer systems.. All those changes are now being managed on JIRA). But this method seems not efficiently when the number of customers inscrease more and more.

I would like to ask if any methodology/tool to manage and distribute our fix/update to the customer. What is the best practice can support that?

Hope to hearing from you..

Thank you,
Kenny

entry.title: How do I pass selection parameter range into BDC?
entry.content:
I recently changed the Fiscal Year field from single parameter to range parameter.

This is how I pass the values of Fiscal Year to BDC.

 

'SO_GJAHR-LOW ' P_GJAHR.

 

Since the Fiscal Year is now range parameter. Will it be able to pass all the values of P_GJAHR into the BDC?

Assuming that the dates I will be using are 2020,2022,2024. Would I be able to pass all of the values?

I tried to use this code:

 

SO_GJAHR-LOW P_GJAHR-LOW
SO_GJAHR-HIGH P_GJAHR-HIGH

entry.title: Validate FI Document
entry.content:
Hi Team,

During MIGO posting, a background FI document is created, and the GL clearing account is also added. We need to validate the GL clearing account.

So, Please provide any User Exits or BADI's or enhancement point..

Thanks In Advance,

Regards,

Maheswar.

entry.title: How does edoc_cockpit generate an XML?
entry.content: I'm trying to identify how the XML was built by the edoc_cockpit

entry.title: Search Help to Custom Filter Field in "Manage Customer Line Items"
entry.content:
Hello,

 @Andre_Fischer,

         I came across your reply related to one of the issues that I am facing and was wondering if you might be able to guide me on below. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/redefined-service-new-entityset-methods-did-not-get-created/qaq-p/11067796 

I am to make changes to "Manage Customer Line Items" OR FAR_CUSTOMER_LINE_ITEMS (Redefined) to accommodate custom field 'PARVW' OR 'Partner Function'. So far I have managed to

  1. add my custom field 'PARVW' to structure FAR_IFIARLINEITEM_EX.
  2. I was able to populate this field using method ITEMSET_GET_ENTITYSET. 

Now the problem :-

 After I added this field 'PARVW' to the filter, how do I provide the Search Help for the new custom field 'PARVW'? 

I tried to attach a search help H_TPAR to the new entity using  the solution I  found https://www.samplecodeabap.com/sap-segw-odata-mpc_ext-define-code-collection/ , but since this is a redefinition of standard service when I debug to check the newly added entity  cannot be accessed and since it cannot be accessed I cannot populate it.

Since it is allowed to add custom field to filters, I am hoping that there is probably a way to attach the search help to same. How can I get the filter to work for custom field 'PARVW'? 

Your help would be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Adobe form hyperlink
entry.content:
Hi ABAPers,

I am unable to create hyperlink in adobe forms , taking text from SO10.

Used smartstyles method <HL>, used <a href > method , made the change in text field to rich text - Not worked.

My requirement is I have text in so10 and wanted to make one string as hyperlink

Any solution for this?

entry.title: Using BAPI delivery order to PGI through API
entry.content:
Hello Experts!!!

 Based on STO we create auto generated delivery order using API where BAPI ''BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CREATE_STO"  used. Right now similar way we need to complete the delivery order line wise using BAPI through API completed with PGI where update S.Loc (LGORT) and Picked Qty (PIKMG) .I created a custom BAPI and its work for 15 records after that its gave error.

Please guided me. Attachment given as reference.
